name: Team Fair Fight
subject: It's up to us to continue Dr. Martin Luther King Jr's legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
63 years later Dr. King's words still ring true. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ea/34a064cc/1b7887bc/7034e2f/2765505828/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Hi Friend - In 1957 Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. gave a speech called "Give us the Ballot" to a crowd of 20,000 people on the steps of the Lincoln Memorial. It was an indictment of a Congress, which at the time was failing to ensure voting rights for Black Americans. In his address he proclaimed: _" Give us the ballot, and we will no longer have to worry the federal government about our basic rights."_ **63 years later Dr. King 's words still ring true.** As you know, the right to vote is under attack right now across the country. And in the absence of federal protections it's up to advocacy groups like ours to honor Dr. King's legacy through not just words, but action -- and fight back against these attempts to suppress the vote. Here at Fair Fight, we know how far we have to go so that marginalized communities have access to the ballot box. Monday marks the day when the country comes together to commemorate the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. -- but his legacy is too big to be realized in just one day. We must fight **every single day** to achieve his dream of ensuring what has been so long denied to so many Americans - the freedom to participate in free and fair elections With you in the fight \- Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5ea/34a064cc/1b7887bc/7034e2c/2765505828/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwMTE4MjBNTEstMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-mlkday?refcode=IE011820MLK-1-a")**

body:
**In my last election, our campaign faced unprecedented attacks from Special Interests who flooded our District with misleading ads attacking my record. **

These attack ads were paid for by Dark Money groups whose identities were obscured and could not be held accountable for their mischaracterizations.

The only reason these Dark Money-funded ads were allowed in Arizona was because of _Citizens United_ , a court case that has enabled unlimited, anonymous spending in our federal elections.

[**Add your name to join me in calling on Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment overturning _Citizens United_ »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/SrFbrUjAEDOE4U8tldDgYSybHNWv9ZguuIHnKu6aVjY=/gnYTHqwMgGo0IpFvSXf9ck5rLW_9hnTLEjz2BNTlj9E=?code=Stanton&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_011720_CitizensUnitedJA_A%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SrFbrUjAEDOE4U8tldDgYSybHNWv9ZguuIHnKu6aVjY=/gnYTHqwMgGo0IpFvSXf9ck5rLW_9hnTLEjz2BNTlj9E=?code=Stanton&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_011720_CitizensUnitedJA_A%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto)

Look, for me, the fight against _Citizens United_ is personal because of the false attacks I faced from these Dark Money groups.

**We cannot let shady Special Interests continue to hijack our Democracy.**

I was proud to lead a vote on the Phoenix City Council when I was Mayor to end Dark Money in city elections and I am ready to lead this effort now in Congress.

[**Will you join me in calling on Congress to pass an Amendment overturning _Citizens United_?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/SrFbrUjAEDOE4U8tldDgYSybHNWv9ZguuIHnKu6aVjY=/gnYTHqwMgGo0IpFvSXf9ck5rLW_9hnTLEjz2BNTlj9E=?code=Stanton&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3DX_011720_CitizensUnitedJA_A%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto)

subject: Our climate movement has the momentum to pass the Green New Deal, but we need your help to keep Ed in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Researchers from NASA and NOAA just announced that the past decade was the hottest on record.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfb5/693b8b0a/43462f7c/72de77db/1772117564/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Researchers from NASA and NOAA just announced that the past decade was the hottest on record.
Every indication is that this trend is getting worse right now due to our inaction. The last five years make up the top five hottest years on record.
The only way we can avert global disasters is with the Green New Deal, and that will not happen without Senator Markey's leadership in the Senate.
[**Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today to help keep Ed in the fight? We need his leadership in the Senate to make sure we pass the Green New Deal. Our planet cannot afford to wait any longer.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfb5/693b8b0a/43462f7c/72de77da/1772117564/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200119-full")
There is no getting around it. The planet is on fire.
That's the bad news. The good news -- the news that should give us hope -- is that the movement for climate action is larger and stronger than ever before.
Senator Markey was a lonely voice on this issue when he first started sounding the alarm bells. He put a national spotlight on the issue at the 1980 Democratic National Convention when he warned of a warming planet.
The science has been clear all along, and he has fought relentlessly.
Public opinion has finally shifted fully in our direction, and the young people of this country led by the Sunrise Movement have started the largest climate movement in history.
With the momentum behind our movement, we cannot afford to lose our greatest ally and champion in the Senate. We need Ed, and he needs us. What do you say?
[**Make a $3 donation right now to our campaign. Ed is facing his toughest re-election ever, and he cannot win without our support.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfb5/693b8b0a/43462f7c/72de77da/1772117564/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200119-full")
Thank you in advance for chipping in. Every donation sends a powerful message about the strength of our movement.
\- Team Markey

name: Michael Bennet
subject: gratitude and determination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends, I wanted to take a moment to share my gratitude for this team.

I've asked a lot of you over the last few months. Your individual contributions helped us to not just meet but exceed our fundraising goals. So thank you for everything you continue to do. This campaign wouldn't be here without your continued support.

It's not lost on me that some people considered this campaign a long shot, but the power of our grassroots team continues to dispel their doubts, and I'm grateful to have you in my corner, friend.

As a nation, we face momentous decisions about our future.

If we are again at one of history's turning points, as I believe we are, then we have a choice to make.

We must decide if we'll take the easy path of our worst instincts and pessimism, or if we will confidently rally together with vigor and optimism.

The United States is the world's oldest and greatest democracy. It has grown in prosperity and power even as it has matured in its understanding of the rights its founders first articulated, as subsequent generations of founders sharpened those rights and extended them to people long denied them.

_**Friend, there is still so much more to be done for our nation.**_

Each of us, with individual talent and spirit and hard work, is called upon to be a founder. Each of us - in obligation to others - is called upon to rebuild the republic. What if each of us were to answer that call?

With immense gratitude,

Michael

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump destroys environmental protections while the globe heats up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The 2010s have officially been declared the world's hottest decade in recorded history, with the past 40 years seeing an average increase of 0.32 degrees per decade. And there is a 95% chance that 2020 will follow in that trend as one of the hottest years as well. Meanwhile, Trump has increased oil drilling access in our national parks, stopped states from regulating car emissions, and withdrawn the U.S. from the Paris Climate Accord \-- ALL WHILE making the ridiculous claim that he is an "environmentalist," citing a book written by one of his own advisors titled "Donald Trump: An Environmental Hero." Democrats are fighting back, passing environmental protection legislation in the House, including limiting pollutants in our drinking water, reentering the U.S. into the Paris Climate Accord, and reducing diesel emissions in our air. The futures of our climate, our environment, and ourselves are at stake in this election \-- we need to know where engaged Democrats stand today: **Do you trust Trump to save our planet?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfe6/6e9863e8/17f3a49f/1db059ee/1654035537/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/1D_2TLoJ") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfe6/6e9863e8/17f3a49f/1db059ee/1654035537/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/1D_2TLoJ") Thank you for your commitment to the cause. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfe6/6e9863e8/17f3a49f/1db059ed/1654035537/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200119a.ND&refcode2=TAE4czmuHlRu4MnIOeAC")

name: Wendy Davis
subject: The future of the Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
If the GOP is coming after our neighbor's health care, you and I had better speak up
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-healthcare?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk25-su-nd&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-healthcare%3Fcode%3Djtk25-su-nd")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-healthcare?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk25-su-nd&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-healthcare%3Fcode%3Djtk25-su-nd")
Friend,
My home state of Texas has more people living without health insurance than any other state in the nation - about 5 million people.
It's easy to skim over that statistic when it's simply numbers on a page. But just ask anyone who's ever rushed a sick kid to the emergency room in the middle of the night or squeezed their budget to afford that new medication - the consequences are very, very real.
We need to be doing _more_ to make sure everyone gets the health care we need - not rolling back the protections we already have. And yet the GOP - including my opponent, Rep. Chip Roy - has done the exact opposite: They attack the Affordable Care Act at every chance they get.
**With so many Americans depending on the ACA, the attacks must stop. That 's why I'm asking you to join me in calling on Congress right now: **[Will you sign my petition and demand that Congress protect affordable health care?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-healthcare?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk25-su-nd&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-healthcare%3Fcode%3Djtk25-su-nd")****
Texas is a key battleground in the fight for the future of the Affordable Care Act. A lawsuit intended to undo the ACA got its start here - and it could decide the fate of families all across the nation.
In the Texas I know, we don't turn our backs on our neighbors. If the GOP is coming after our neighbors' health care, you and I had better speak up.
So please, join me in speaking up right now. **I need 780 more people to add their names before midnight tonight.**[Sign the petition: Demand Congress protect affordable health care!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-healthcare?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk25-su-nd&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-healthcare%3Fcode%3Djtk25-su-nd")****
Thank you,
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361adb/704929dc/161d5a44/39938ea9/160780209/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361adb/704929dc/161d5a44/39938ea8/160780209/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361adb/704929dc/161d5a44/39938eab/160780209/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Will you add your name and join me in this fight to protect the rights and equality of people with disabilities?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
As President, I will make it clear that disability rights are a priority in my administration -- by working in partnership with the disability community to combat ableism. That's why, earlier... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a57e/45c30650/1e21d266a/66fe31bc/4087454274/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
This year marks the 30th anniversary of the ADA and the 100th anniversary of the Vocational Rehabilitation program.

And though we have made significant progress for the 61 million Americans living with disabilities, we have a lot of ground left to cover. **People with disabilities are still fighting for economic security, equal opportunity, and inclusion -- and they are not fighting alone.**

As President, I will make it clear that disability rights are a priority in my administration -- by working in partnership with the disability community to combat ableism. That's why, earlier this month, I released my plan to protect the rights and equality of people with disabilities.

It starts by creating a National Office of Disability Coordination to ensure that federal programs work together to support people with disabilities.

**[Will you join me in this fight? Add your name to support my plan for protecting the rights and equality of people with disabilities.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a57e/45c30650/1e21d266a/66fe31bf/4087454274/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4wOFBfUkxUX0RJU19FXzIwMjAwMTE5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-disability-rights?source=EMN08P_RLT_DIS_E_20200119_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Here's how we'll do it.

-> **First, we'll build an economy that works for everyone -- which means rewriting the rules of the economy to foster inclusivity, end labor market discrimination and exploitation, and value the labor of people with disabilities.** I'll fight for a $15 an hour minimum wage for all workers -- ending the shameful practice of subminimum wage -- and have a plan for national paid family and medical leave, ensuring that people with disabilities and their family members get the time off they need without risking their financial security.

To build economic security for people with disabilities, we must also rewrite the rules of government programs that trap them in poverty. Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) and Supplemental Security Income (SSI) are meant to provide financial security to people with disabilities, but too often that's not the case. **As President, I will fight to reform these programs to ensure that they provide strong support for people with disabilities and move them toward financial security.**

-> **Next, a Warren administration will make sure families with children with disabilities have support in the earliest years to set them up for success later in life.** I've already committed to expanding funding for early intervention services for infants, toddlers and young children. And my plan for Universal Child Care and Early Learning will provide high-quality child care and early learning to 12 million kids across the country, so working families can count on having early childhood care that is responsive to their child's needs. I'll ensure that all participating child care centers are fully ADA-compliant, so that no family is denied access to quality early learning opportunities for their child due to disability.

-> **I will also fight for every kid in America to have access to a high-quality public education.** I've committed to making good on the federal government's promise to fully fund IDEA, so that students with disabilities have access to a great public education. My administration will vigilantly enforce IDEA, Section 504 of the Rehabilitation Act, and the ADA, and tackle discriminatory policies and practices head-on. I will support inclusive, culturally-responsive, identity-affirming, and comprehensive education, provide meaningful access to career and college readiness, and ensure higher education institutions support students with disabilities.

-> The rapid pace of technological advancement has brought many positive changes for people with disabilities, improving their health, safety, and ability to interact with the world. But technology also poses risks when it is used in ways that discriminate against individuals with disabilities or exclude them from an increasingly digital world. **My administration will work to bring down the costs of assistive technologies that allow people with disabilities to lead fuller lives.**

-> **Next, I will protect the rights and civil liberties of people with disabilities in areas like voting, criminal justice, immigration, and parental custody.** Systemic failures to consider and include people with disabilities have resulted in unconscionable limitations on their freedom to participate in our society. We cannot build a strong democracy when individuals are systematically denied their rights. My administration will safeguard the rights and liberties of people with disabilities and work to ensure that our society and democracy are truly inclusive.

-> Everyone should have a decent, affordable, and safe place to live, but stagnant wages, sky-rocketing rents, and a stark shortage of affordable options are putting the squeeze on American households. For people living with disabilities, finding affordable housing can be even more difficult due to limited accessible options and pervasive housing discrimination. **My Housing Plan for America adds more than 3 million new affordable housing units and prioritizes a portion of these units to particularly vulnerable groups like the chronically homeless, people living with HIV, people with disabilities, seniors who want to age in place, and people who have been incarcerated and are returning to the community.** I'll also protect the rights of renters, and I'll work to ensure that we raise the standard of living in all public housing, fight to completely close the national public housing capital repair backlog, and invest in climate-resilient, accessible, and new public housing construction.

-> Our fight for environmental justice and response to climate change must factor in the impact on individuals with disabilities. **From housing and public transportation to disaster planning and response, I will make sure that their needs are front and center as we tackle environmental justice and climate change.**

-> Health care is a human right, but too many people with disabilities face barriers to quality care. People with disabilities are frequently denied coverage, subject to discriminatory treatment, or receive inadequate services. We need a system that empowers all people to live full lives. **We need a health care system that reflects our values. That system is Medicare for All. My plan reduces health care costs in America, eliminates profiteering, enforces mental health parity, and ensures everyone can get the care they need without going broke.** And I will guarantee seniors and those with disabilities the right to home and community-based services.

-> Under the Trump administration, the United States has neglected its responsibility to be a leader in human rights, including disability rights. **As President, I will make disability rights a priority in my approach to foreign policy by upholding internationally recognized human rights -- which include disability rights -- by establishing an Office of Disability Rights at the State Department, and by ratifying the Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities.**

As President, I will fight alongside the disability community for justice across all aspects of life and to fulfill the four goals of the ADA: equal opportunity, full participation, independent living, and economic self sufficiency. We all do better when everyone has the opportunity to fully participate in all aspects of life.

**Together, we can realize a truly inclusive world -- but getting there is going to take your help. ****[Will you add your name to show your support for my plan to protect the rights and equality of people with disabilities?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a57e/45c30650/1e21d266a/66fe31bf/4087454274/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4wOFBfUkxUX0RJU19FXzIwMjAwMTE5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-disability-rights?source=EMN08P_RLT_DIS_E_20200119_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Elizabeth

| | I'm proud that so many of my friends and fellow veterans have stepped forward to run for office in seats across the country this year. I'm writing today to tell you about one of them-a Black Hawk pilot and JAG attorney named James Mackler. James joined the U.S. Army after we were attacked on 9/11 because he felt like he had to do more in a time of crisis. As a 30-year old lawyer, James closed his practice, earned an age waiver, learned to fly a Black Hawk, and became a _Screaming Eagle_ serving in the 101st Airborne Division. James' deployment to Iraq coincided with a sharp spike in I.E.D. attacks that made the roads more unsafe and made his job transporting soldiers by air one of the most important in our cause. Since he's never shied away from a fight, it's no surprise to me that today James Mackler is running for U.S. Senate in Tennessee. VOLUNTEER HERE (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=eee4ade065-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-eee4ade065-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the new year.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. 134 DAYS until the primary on June 2nd. We NEED your support (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=eee4ade065-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-eee4ade065-25822489) today!
BUILDING OUR NETWORK
Busy week yet again on the campaign trail: Honored to spend some time with the Hancock County Farm Bureau (https://www.facebook.com/hancockcountyIowafarmbureau/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=eee4ade065-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-eee4ade065-25822489) to discuss ag issues and our need to rein in the EPA. Great to be with the Boone County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Boone-County-Iowa-Republicans-135793693101285/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=eee4ade065-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-eee4ade065-25822489) as well reconnecting with supporters and adding more Iowans to #TeamBret.

Many thanks to Peggy for opening her home and inviting me to bring our message to voters in Clarion. Appreciate the support in the room and each voter's time. I'll work every day in Congress to make sure opportunity returns to our rural communities so our grandchildren have the choice to come home.

UP NEXT

Looking forward to meeting with local conservatives in the Dickinson County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Dickinson-County-Iowa-GOP-986112074805887/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=eee4ade065-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-eee4ade065-25822489) in Spirit Lake and Cherokee County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/cherokeeiagop/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=eee4ade065-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-eee4ade065-25822489) in Cherokee. Iowans are looking for a conservative outsider to go to Congress, stand with President Trump, and get the job done.

* Securing the Border (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2feYd5WAXtU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=eee4ade065-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-eee4ade065-25822489)

* and much more... (https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6ycE8yzCF0tZeOk5rwVMemYssZoNXHy&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=eee4ade065-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-eee4ade065-25822489)

GET INVOLVED

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O5xPeOhUV0U&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=eee4ade065-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-eee4ade065-25822489

body:
| | We'll keep this short. Team, we'll keep this short. Since we first emailed you about our $250,000 goal a few days ago, thousands of small-dollar donors have already stepped up to help send Cory back to the Senate for another term. **Can you chip in as a Founding Donor right now to help us get closer to hitting our first big fundraising goal?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200119_TC_20200119-fr-TC-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

It would be a huge setback if we fell short of the first fundraising goal of Cory's re-election campaign, so if you can, **[please chip in right now.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200119_TC_20200119-fr-TC-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Let's do this.
Team Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200119_TC_20200119-fr-TC-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fc1/5fca0d19/7ab71cad/291d3b36/2934810582/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/unsubscribe").
